header.class: fixed w-full z-40 transition-all duration-300 top-0

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 lg:px-6 py-2 sm:py-3 flex items-center justify-between

a.class: text-sm xl:text-base font-medium flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-200 py-2 px-1 text-[#1C394B] hover:text-[#FE5901]
text-sm xl:text-base font-medium flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-200 py-2 px-1 text-[#1C394B] hover:text-[#FE5901]
text-sm xl:text-base font-medium flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-200 py-2 px-1 text-[#1C394B] hover:text-[#FE5901]
text-sm xl:text-base font-medium flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-200 py-2 px-1 text-[#1C394B] hover:text-[#FE5901]
text-sm xl:text-base font-medium flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-200 py-2 px-1 text-[#1C394B] hover:text-[#FE5901]

button.class: relative bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-primary to-primary/90 hover:from-primary/90 hover:via-primary hover:to-primary text-white rounded-full px-2 sm:px-10 py-2 sm:py-1 text-xs sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium flex items-center gap-3 group transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm overflow-hidden

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/10 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500

svg.class: lucide lucide-chevron-down w-5 h-5 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-110

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/5 to-transparent transform -skew-x-12 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-full transition-all duration-700

button.class: lg:hidden p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200 cursor-pointer text-[#1C394B] hover:bg-[#FE5901]/10

div.class: min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-black flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4
animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-[#FE5901] mx-auto

div.p: If the app doesn't open automatically, we'll show you download options.

div.class: relative z-10 max-w-full mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-16
rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl border mb-16 relative
absolute top-0 right-0 w-40 h-40 transform translate-x-1/3 -translate-y-1/3 rounded-full opacity-20
relative z-10 p-8 md:py-4 md:px-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-8
inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium

div.p: Join our community to receive the latest updates, industry insights, and exclusive offers straight to your inbox.

input.class: w-full px-5 py-4 pr-14 rounded-full border-2 shadow-sm outline-none transition-colors border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-300
input.name: email

button.class: cursor-pointer absolute right-2 top-2 rounded-full p-3 text-white

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-8 lg:gap-12

div.p: Starbuzz.ai is a unified influencer marketing platform, empowering brands, agencies, and influencers with AI-driven tools to create, manage, and grow through successful campaigns, all in one ecosystem!
- If it's Influencer marketing , it's happening on Starbuzz.ai

svg.class: lucide lucide-mail h-4 w-4 opacity-70 mr-1

a.class: w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full transition-colors

w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full transition-colors
